text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At last, the day of her Make Debut has arrived.
For most horsegirls, a first race like this
would be nerve-wracking, but Buena Vista
was…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Wow…!
Look at the ceiling!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
The stained glass at Kyoto Racecourse,
no matter how many times I see it…
it's still so beautiful.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
To be able to start the beginning of this
journey in a place like this… that makes
me really happy.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Right, Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Filled with hope, she smiles with quiet
confidence. I try to steady myself the same
way…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Huh?
All of a sudden…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: My hands, are kind of shaking…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha…
Maybe the nerves are finally catching up
to me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Buena Vista is deeply sensitive. She easily
resonates with the atmosphere and the
emotions of those around her. Which means…
she probably picked it up from me.
choice_data_list: Sorry, I'm the one who's nervous.
Sorry, I'm the one who's nervous.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Eh…
Really?
choice_data_list: You remember your rivals for today, right?
You remember your rivals for today, right?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Of course!
All the girls who were featured in that same
magazine, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That "Horsegirls to Watch This Year"
feature Special Week brought us before.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Alongside Buena Vista, there were several
others highlighted before their debut…

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unicalize, At the Crest,
Sansha Sangyo, and Shindou Runrun.
Those four.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
They're all strong, aren't they.
…Oh, is that why you're nervous?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Because you're worried about whether
I can win…?
choice_data_list: No. That's not what I'm worried about.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Several top horsegirls, including Buena Vista,
were all set to debut in the same race.
And as a result…

text_block_list.name: Race Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, this race is stacked!
Every single one of them feels like a main
character…!

text_block_list.name: Race Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Whoever wins this is basically jumping
straight to the top of their generation…
Ahh, I can't wait to get to the track!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kyoto Racecourse is packed with
passionate fans, and the media's all over it.
Thinking about making a debut in this kind
of atmosphere…
choice_data_list: I can't help but tense up.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: I see…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
You can really feel it,
All those expectations.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
…Alright!
Let's have a staring contest!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Come on, don't you remember?
Back when I ran in that kids' race…

text_block_list.name: Young Buena
text_block_list.text:
"Uuugh… I'm so nervous.
Do you think I'll run okay…?"

text_block_list.name: Big Brother
text_block_list.text:
"…Buena, let's do a staring contest!
Come on… Buuu～! Uuuu,  uuu—!"

text_block_list.name: Big Sister
text_block_list.text:
"…Buena, let's do a staring contest!
Come on… Buuu～! Uuuu,  uuu—!"

text_block_list.name: Young Buena
text_block_list.text:
"…Ahaha!
Big brother, your face is very funny～!"

text_block_list.name: Young Buena
text_block_list.text:
"…Ahaha!
Big brother, your face is very funny～!"

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: That really helped me calm down, you know?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
So…
Here we go!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Let's have a staring contest!
Ready… go!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Puu～!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …How was that?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
…!
Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
See, that was a pretty funny face, right?
I can do it too, you know.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In truth, it wasn't much of a funny face at
all. But the way she looked so proud of it
made me laugh. And just like that, the
tension melted away.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
You're welcome!
It's your Make Debut too, after all. Let's
enjoy it, okay?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
…Yeah, that's right.
It's a special day, so I want to start it
feeling a little more excited.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Oh!
That actually sounds like a lot of fun!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Well, let's try it!
Ready… go!
